query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM viral_examples) as viral_examples_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM viral_example_embeddings) as embeddings_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM viral_clusters) as clusters_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_accounts) as ip_accounts_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_success_factors) as success_factors_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts) as ip_posts_count;
